Bash(cd /home/levine/src/abettrme/backend && source venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from app.database import engine
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    result = conn.execute\(__import__\('sqlalchemy'\).text\(\\"SELECT typname FROM pg_type WHERE typname = 'fieldtype'\\"\)\)
    print\('enum exists:', result.fetchall\(\)\)
    result2 = conn.execute\(__import__\('sqlalchemy'\).text\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN \('activity_custom_fields','activity_log_field_values'\)\\"\)\)
    print\('tables:', result2.fetchall\(\)\)
")

from datetime import date, datetime
from typing import Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel

class TestUpdate\(BaseModel\):
    activity_id: Optional[int] = None
    date: Optional[date] = None
    notes: Optional[str] = None

print\(TestUpdate.__annotations__\)
print\(TestUpdate.model_validate\({'date': '2026-03-12'}\)\)
" 2>&1)
